scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_019 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
The **maxclassrepeat** parameter has been added to **/etc/security/pwquality.conf**, enforcing the required password quality rule.

**File updated – /etc/security/pwquality.conf**
```conf
ucredit = -1
lcredit = -1
minlen = 8
ocredit = -1
dcredit = -1
# Managed centrally: difok parameter
difok = 4
enforce_for_root
maxclassrepeat = 2
```

This change satisfies the OpenSCAP finding **accounts_password_pam_maxclassrepeat**, limiting passwords to no more than two consecutive characters from the same character class. No other system configuration was altered.
